MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar May-05-2014 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. DEFENDANT BRIAN WALISER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is Granted. No opposition filed. The Court signed the Stipulation and Order To Vacate Judgment prior to the hearing. Judge: A. James Robertson, II; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR# 5976.

MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT BRIAN WALISER'S MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is continued to May 5, 2014 per the agreement of the parties. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith, Clerk: Cynthia Herbert, Not reported. =(302/EHG)

MOTION FOR SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT
Off Calendar Mar-10-2014 Continued To Apr-07-14 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT BRIAN WALISER'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE/VACATE JUDGMENT is continued to April 7, 2014 at 9:30 am in Department 302 per stipulation of counsel and to give moving party the opportunity to comply with Local Rule 2.6B. Moving party must deliver courtesy copies of the moving papers to Department 302, with a cover letter stating the new hearing date, no later than March 10, 2014 at 4:00 pm or the motion will be denied. Any exhibit must be separated by an exhibit tab per CRC 3.1110(f). The court has courtesy copies of the proposed order only. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Sherry Sawyer, CSR# 5976.

Off Calendar Nov-14-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.

Denise H. Field, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff, BUCHALTER NEMER, a Professional Corporation.

No appearance by defaulted defendant(s) VEN CAPITAL GROUP HOLDINGS, LLC, a Delaware Limited Liability Company, WOORE, LLC, an Oregon Limited Liability Company, BRIAN G. WALISER, an individual.
Default of Defendant(s) has been duly entered.
Court ordered declarations filed in support of Request for Default Prove-up admitted in evidence.
After Evidence and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff and against Defaulted Defendant(s) as follows:

Damages: $57,821.00
Pre-Judgment Interest: $15,792.48
Attorney's Fees: $800.00
Costs: $805.00
Total Judgment in the amount of $75,218.48
Judgment signed in open court.
